drivers.notes: Vented; Hybrid Cross-Section Expanded Tractrix horn

description.en: Mid-sized two-way standmount of the Reference Premiere II line — 1" titanium LTS tweeter in a Hybrid Cross-Section Tractrix horn paired with a 6.5" Cerametallic woofer with Faraday ring. Bi-wirable dual binding posts, internally-braced MDF cabinet, 94.5 dB sensitivity and 400 W peak.
description.es: Bookshelf de dos vías de tamaño medio de la línea Reference Premiere II — tweeter LTS de titanio de 1" en horn Tractrix Hybrid Cross-Section junto a un woofer Cerametallic de 6,5" con anillo Faraday. Terminales dobles bi-cableables, gabinete MDF reforzado, 94,5 dB de sensibilidad y 400 W de pico.
